SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPOS, MIGUEL ANGEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 279-20TH AVENUE, APT. 1, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL MAR-29-1994, LEASE FORFEITED

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS INC. SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 279-20TH AVENUE #1, SAN FRANCISCO. THE LEASE IN THIS MATTER SHALL BE FORFEITED. EXECUTION WILL BE STAYED UNTIL 3-29-94. IF DEFENDANT, MIGUEL ANGEL CAMPOS MOVES BY 3-29-94, PLAINTIFF WEST & PRASZKER REALTORS INC. WILL WAIVE UNPAID RENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL CAMPOS WILL WAIVE SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST ON THIS DEPOSIT. MIGUEL CAMPOS STATES HE IS THE ONLY PERSON LIVING ON THE PREMISES AT 270-20TH AVENUE, #1, SAN FRANCISCO MR. CAMPOS WILL NOT SEEK ANY FURTHER DELAY IN THIS CASE. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, CALENDAR OF MAR-04-1994, DENIED FAILED TO APPEAR AT HEARING.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, CALENDAR OF MAR-04-1994, DENIED FAILED TO APPEAR FOR HEARING.
